SEARCH

Package neqsim.process.automation

package neqsim.process.automation
Stable automation API for programmatic interaction with running NeqSim process simulations.

This package provides a string-addressable facade over NeqSim's process simulation internals. Variables in the simulation are reachable through stable dot-notation paths such as "separator-1.gasOutStream.temperature", enabling scripts and AI agents to interact with simulations without awareness of the Java class hierarchy.

Core classes:

  • ProcessAutomation — the main facade providing getUnitList, getVariableList, getVariableValue, setVariableValue
  • SimulationVariable — descriptor for a simulation variable (address, type, unit, description)
See Also:
  • ProcessAutomation
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    neqsim.process
     
  • Class
    Description
    AdjustableParameter
    Describes a single adjustable parameter (a degree of freedom) exposed by a process simulation.
    AdjustableParameter.Source
    Identifies where an adjustable parameter originates.
    AgenticProcessOptimizer
    Closed-loop, derivative-free optimizer that drives a process simulation through the string-addressable ProcessAutomation.evaluate(Map, String, java.util.List) primitive.
    AgenticProcessOptimizer.Constraint
    Immutable descriptor of a hard inequality constraint.
    AgenticProcessOptimizer.ConstraintType
    Comparison direction for a hard inequality constraint.
    AgenticProcessOptimizer.DecisionVariable
    Immutable descriptor of a bounded decision variable.
    AgenticProcessOptimizer.OptimizationResult
    Outcome of an optimization run, including the best point and the full trajectory.
    AgenticProcessOptimizer.Sense
    Optimization sense for an address-based objective.
    AgenticProcessOptimizer.Trial
    Record of one evaluated candidate point: the (state, action, reward) tuple consumed by ML and agentic post-processing.
    AutomationDiagnostics
    Provides self-diagnosis, fuzzy matching, and error-recovery capabilities for the ProcessAutomation API.
    AutomationDiagnostics.DiagnosticResult
    A diagnostic result returned when an operation fails, containing the error analysis, closest suggestions, and auto-correction attempt.
    AutomationDiagnostics.ErrorCategory
    Classification of automation errors for structured remediation.
    AutomationDiagnostics.OperationRecord
    Tracks a single automation operation for learning.
    AutomationDiagnostics.PhysicalBound
    Represents physical bounds for a property value.
    AutomationDiagnostics.ScoredName
    Helper for sorting names by match score.
    DefaultWriteValidators
    Container of WriteValidator implementations that ship with NeqSim.
    DefaultWriteValidators.CompressorWriteValidator
    Validator for Compressor.
    DefaultWriteValidators.CoolerWriteValidator
    Validator for Cooler.
    DefaultWriteValidators.HeaterWriteValidator
    Validator for Heater.
    DefaultWriteValidators.PumpWriteValidator
    Validator for Pump.
    DefaultWriteValidators.SeparatorWriteValidator
    Validator for Separator.
    DefaultWriteValidators.ThrottlingValveWriteValidator
    Validator for ThrottlingValve.
    ProcessAutomation
    Provides a stable, string-addressable automation API for interacting with a running NeqSim ProcessSystem or ProcessModel.
    ProcessAutomation.ResolvedUnit
    Holds a resolved unit and its address prefix for variable naming.
    SensitivityAnalyzer
    Gradient and Jacobian computation over the agent-facing ProcessAutomation API.
    SensitivityAnalyzer.Mode
    Perturbation mode.
    SimulationVariable
    Describes a single variable exposed by a unit operation in a process simulation.
    SimulationVariable.VariableType
    Variable access type.
    TransactionalBatchResult
    Outcome of a call to ProcessAutomation.setValuesTransactional(java.util.Map, String).
    TransactionalBatchResult.RollbackCategory
    Classifies why a batch was rolled back (or null when committed).
    TransactionalBatchResult.WriteOutcome
    Per-write outcome inside a transactional batch.
    WriteValidationResult
    Outcome of a write validation.
    WriteValidationResult.Severity
    Severity classification for a validation result.
    WriteValidator
    Strategy interface for validating writes to a specific equipment class before they are applied to the simulation.
    WriteValidatorRegistry
    Registry of WriteValidator instances keyed by equipment class.
